title: 404Piyush/google-maps-review-analyzer
summary: This project scrapes and analyzes Google Maps reviews.

title: NotYuSheng/TracePcap
summary: Self-hosted PCAP analysis platform with LLM-powered incident triage, signature-based threat detection, and AI-generated incident narratives. Features network change monitoring across captures, deep packet inspection via nDPI, and automated Wireshark filter generation. Runs fully offline with local LLMs (Ollama, LM Studio).

summary: AI-powered Git Assistant for CLI

title: dovvnloading/Graphlink
summary: Graphlink (formerly Graphite) is a local-first, graph-based AI workspace for building branching reasoning workflows, running agent plugins, and orchestrating multiple AI providers in a visual environment designed for complex problem solving.

title: langchain4j/langchain4j
summary: LangChain4j is an idiomatic, open-source Java library for building LLM-powered applications on the JVM. It offers a unified API over popular LLM providers and vector stores, and makes implementing tool calling (including MCP support), agents and RAG easy. It integrates seamlessly with enterprise Java frameworks like Quarkus and Spring Boot.

title: gonzaloMorenoc/Mnemo
summary: QA Continuity AI — a private, on-premise platform that turns scattered project knowledge (rules, flows, bugs, tests, CI) into test plans, Playwright automation, and searchable QA memory. 100% local LLMs via Ollama + HuggingFace, zero API cost.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.
